text.title: Generative UI Design Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "brief_id": "checkout-redesign-2026", "variants_generated": 8, "selected_variant_id": "v0-3", "selection_rationale": "Three-step layout matches existing mental model; cart-summary fixed-position addresses scroll-loss feedback.", "labelled_not_production": true, "refinement_list": [ "Replace placeholder copy with localised strings", "Swap generic icons for brand-token icons", "Verify token contrast on dark mode" ], "generators_used": [ "v0", "claude-artifacts" ] }

example.note: Fewer than 5 variants; missing rationale + refinement_list; production label not set.

forbidden.pattern: Output MUST NOT contain placeholder values listed in the validator script PLACEHOLDERS set. Reject any field whose value matches case-insensitively.
